meaning: adj.鼓舞人的,活跃的,非凡的
examples: The music worked up to a rousing finale.
The music builds up to a rousing climax.
The team was given a rousing reception by the fans.
Players however, must overcome the odd adversity including--timpani drums and rousing horn section cued--shareholders.
Though a rousing success story today, things were not so smooth at the beginning.
